title: pinus mugo subsp. rotundata
intro: Pinus mugo subsp. rotundata, also known as Round-leaf Mountain Pine, is a subspecies of evergreen shrub or small tree native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The medicinal properties of Pinus mugo subsp. rotundata include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. Pinus mugo subsp. rotundata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to treat a range of health conditions.
